description.from: Update prototype CDK stack in-place to provision S3 Vectors (vector bucket + index) and remove OpenSearch domain resources. Keep embeddings cache bucket and expose S3 vector outputs for runtime configuration.
description.to: Update prototype CDK stack to provision S3 Vectors (vector bucket + index) while retaining existing OpenSearch domain resources. Keep embeddings cache bucket and expose outputs for both stores.

title.from: Prototype CDK stack: replace OpenSearch with S3 Vectors resources
title.to: Prototype CDK stack: add S3 Vectors alongside OpenSearch resources
